headline: Workday takes partial loss as judge refuses to dismiss claims in AI bias lawsuit
summary: The court rejected the company’s position that federal anti-age discrimination law does not cover job applicants.

raw.headline: Workday takes partial loss as judge refuses to dismiss claims in AI bias lawsuit
raw.summary: The court rejected the company’s position that federal anti-age discrimination law does not cover job applicants.

headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.

raw.headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Warning Signs

headline: Switching jobs meant big raises just a few years ago—here’s what the pay bump looks like now
summary: Pay increases for workers who switch jobs are now roughly a third of what they were at the peak of the pandemic hiring boom, a new study shows.

raw.headline: Switching jobs meant big raises just a few years ago—here’s what the pay bump looks like now
raw.summary: Pay increases for workers who switch jobs are now roughly a third of what they were at the peak of the pandemic hiring boom, a new study shows.
